heading: Step 1: The alert condition is met.
body:
- For informational alerts like the [User has joined the organization](<User joined the organization>) alert, Atlas sends notifications as soon as
  the condition is met. These alerts don't appear in the
  Atlas UI.

  The informational alerts workflow ends here.

- Otherwise, Atlas retrieves metrics at regular intervals
  based on [Monitoring Data Storage Granularity](monitoring-storage-granularity).
  When the retrieved metrics indicate that an alert condition is
  met, Atlas tracks the alert condition until it ends, or
  until it remains past the amount of time specified in the
  **send if condition lasts at least** field.

  If the alert condition ends between sampling periods, Atlas
  doesn't track the alert condition or send any notifications.

> **Note:** Processing and network conditions may slightly delay alert
> notification delivery.
